name: aether_tax
description: Full-stack boilerplate with Express/Mongoose and React/Vite/Tailwind

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test:run --prefix frontend
scripts.test:html: npm run test:html --prefix backend && npm run test:html --prefix frontend
